all.en: Dear valued tenants of Lakeside Corporate Tower, we hope this notice finds you well.
all.zh: Lakeside Corporate Tower 的尊貴租戶您好，希望這份通知送達時您一切安好。

all.en: The property management office is writing to inform all occupants of major upcoming maintenance work scheduled to take place over the next three weeks.
all.zh: 物業管理辦公室在此通知所有住戶，未來三週將進行重大的維護工程。

all.en: After a recent annual inspection conducted by certified technicians, two essential building systems were identified as requiring immediate upgrades.
all.zh: 在最近一次由認證技師執行的年度檢查之後，本大樓有兩項重要系統被判定需要立即升級。

all.en: Specifically, our four passenger elevators and the central HVAC system will undergo a comprehensive modernization to improve safety, efficiency, and overall comfort.
all.zh: 具體而言，本棟的四部載客電梯與中央空調系統將進行全面性的現代化更新，以提升安全、效能與整體舒適度。

all.en: The elevator project will begin on Monday, June 1, and is expected to conclude by Friday, June 12.
all.zh: 電梯工程將於 6 月 1 日（週一）開始，預計於 6 月 12 日（週五）完工。

all.en: During this maintenance window, only two of the four elevators will be available at any given time between business hours of 9:00 a.m. and 6:00 p.m.
all.zh: 在此維護期間，營業時間上午 9 點至下午 6 點之間，四部電梯中僅有兩部可同時使用。

all.en: Tenants should anticipate longer than usual wait times and are kindly encouraged to use the stairwells whenever practical.
all.zh: 租戶應預期等候時間將較平常為長，建議在情況允許時多加利用樓梯間。

all.en: The HVAC upgrade is scheduled for the following two weekends, specifically June 13 to 14 and June 20 to 21.
all.zh: 空調系統升級則安排在接下來的兩個週末進行，分別是 6 月 13 至 14 日及 6 月 20 至 21 日。

all.en: Because heating and cooling will be completely unavailable on those Saturdays and Sundays, the contractor will deliver portable fans to each floor lobby in advance.
all.zh: 由於上述週六與週日將完全無法供應暖氣與冷氣，承包商將於施工前將攜帶式風扇配送至各樓層大廳。

all.en: All scheduled outages have been intentionally arranged outside of standard weekday business hours to minimize temporary inconvenience to office operations.
all.zh: 所有預定停機皆刻意安排在一般平日營業時間之外，以將辦公作業的暫時不便降至最低。

all.en: The work will be performed by Meridian Building Services, a fully licensed and insured contractor with more than twenty years of industry experience.
all.zh: 本次工程將由 Meridian Building Services 執行，該公司為持有完整執照與保險的承包商，擁有逾二十年的業界經驗。

all.en: For your safety, please do not enter any area marked with yellow caution tape or signage reading 「Authorized Personnel Only」.
all.zh: 為了您的安全，請勿進入任何貼有黃色警示膠帶或標示「Authorized Personnel Only」的區域。

all.en: Children and pets visiting the building must remain under direct supervision at all times during the construction period.
all.zh: 施工期間，造訪本大樓的孩童與寵物必須全程處於直接監護之下。

all.en: Tenants who require accessibility accommodations, such as priority elevator access, are asked to contact our office by Friday, May 29.
all.zh: 如有無障礙需求（例如優先使用電梯）的租戶，請於 5 月 29 日（週五）前與本辦公室聯繫。

all.en: Deliveries of large or heavy items should be rescheduled, if possible, to avoid the two-week elevator maintenance period.
all.zh: 大型或重物的配送若有可能，建議改期以避開為期兩週的電梯維護期間。

all.en: After-hours access to the freight elevator can be arranged by submitting a written request at least forty-eight hours in advance.
all.zh: 若需於非營業時段使用貨梯，請至少於四十八小時前提出書面申請以便安排。

all.en: Please note that fire alarms may be briefly tested following the HVAC work, and tenants will receive a separate email confirming the exact test time.
all.zh: 請注意，空調工程結束後可能會短暫測試火警警報，本辦公室將另以電子郵件告知確切測試時間。

all.en: We sincerely apologize for any disruption these necessary improvements may cause to your daily routines.
all.zh: 對於本次必要改善工程可能對您日常作業造成的干擾，我們致上誠摯的歉意。

all.en: Once completed, the upgraded systems are expected to reduce energy consumption by approximately fifteen percent and significantly shorten elevator wait times.
all.zh: 工程完成後，升級後的系統預計可降低約百分之十五的能源消耗，並大幅縮短電梯等候時間。

all.en: A follow-up bulletin summarizing the project results will be distributed to every suite during the first week of July.
all.zh: 彙整本次工程成果的後續公告，將於 7 月第一週送達各承租單位。

all.en: If you have any questions, concerns, or special requests, please feel free to contact the property manager, Ms. Helena Choi, at extension 2200.
all.zh: 如有任何疑問、顧慮或特別需求，歡迎與物業經理 Helena Choi 小姐聯繫，分機 2200。

all.en: You may also email the management office at services@lakesidetower.com or visit the front desk on the ground floor during regular weekday hours.
all.zh: 您也可以寄送電子郵件至 services@lakesidetower.com，或於平日一般辦公時間至一樓櫃台洽詢。

all.en: Thank you in advance for your patience, cooperation, and continued partnership as we work to keep Lakeside Corporate Tower a safe and comfortable place to do business.
all.zh: 在我們持續努力讓 Lakeside Corporate Tower 成為安全且舒適的營運場所之際，謹此先行感謝您的耐心、配合與長期合作。

all.en: Complimentary bottled water will be available in every lobby throughout the HVAC outage weekends as a courtesy gesture.
all.zh: 在空調停機的週末期間，每個大廳將免費提供瓶裝水以表心意。

all.en: Security personnel will be increased on each floor during construction hours to monitor unauthorized access and protect tenant assets.
all.zh: 施工時段每樓層將增派保全人員，以監控未經授權的進入並保護租戶資產。

all.en: All contractors must wear visible identification badges and check in at the lobby reception before beginning work each day.
all.zh: 所有承包商每日開始工作前必須佩戴明顯識別證並至大廳櫃檯辦理報到。

all.en: Air quality monitoring devices will be installed on each floor to ensure ventilation standards are maintained during the upgrade.
all.zh: 升級期間每樓層將裝設空氣品質監測裝置，以確保通風標準得以維持。

all.en: Tenants are reminded to back up critical data before the weekend power tests, in case of unexpected brief outages.
all.zh: 提醒租戶於週末電力測試前備份重要資料，以防意外短暫停電。

all.en: Loading dock access will be limited between 7 a.m. and 11 a.m. on weekdays to facilitate equipment deliveries.
all.zh: 為配合設備運送，平日上午 7 點至 11 點間裝卸區的使用將受限。

all.en: The parking garage will remain fully operational, though several spaces near the service entrance may be temporarily reserved.
all.zh: 停車場將維持完全正常運作，但靠近服務入口的數個車位可能會暫時保留。

all.en: Tenant satisfaction surveys will be distributed after the project to gather feedback on the entire process.
all.zh: 工程結束後將發放租戶滿意度調查，以蒐集對整個流程的回饋意見。

all.en: Management is committed to transparent communication and will provide weekly progress updates via email and lobby bulletin boards.
all.zh: 管理單位承諾透明溝通，並將透過電子郵件及大廳公告欄提供每週進度更新。

all.en: We deeply appreciate your understanding and look forward to delivering a more efficient and comfortable building environment.
all.zh: 我們由衷感謝您的諒解，並期待為您打造一個更具效能且舒適的大樓環境。

all.en: Emergency exit routes will be clearly marked with illuminated signage and posted on each elevator lobby during the work.
all.zh: 工程期間，緊急逃生路線將以發光標示清楚標出，並張貼於每個電梯廳。

all.en: A dedicated information hotline will operate from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. daily for urgent maintenance inquiries.
all.zh: 每日上午 7 點至晚間 9 點將開放專線，受理緊急維護相關詢問。

all.en: Tenants hosting external visitors during the upgrade period should provide advance notice to streamline lobby check-in procedures.
all.zh: 升級期間接待外部訪客的租戶應事先通知，以加速大廳的報到流程。

all.en: Recycling bins for construction materials have been placed strategically to minimize environmental impact during the project.
all.zh: 工程期間已策略性配置建築材料回收桶，以將對環境的影響降至最低。

all.en: The rooftop terrace will be temporarily closed during HVAC weekends to ensure technician safety and protect ongoing equipment installations.
all.zh: 空調工程週末期間，頂樓平台將暫時關閉，以確保技師安全並保護進行中的設備安裝作業。

all.en: Cleaning crews will perform enhanced overnight sweeps to remove any dust generated by the elevator modernization work.
all.zh: 清潔人員將進行加強版的夜間清掃，以清除電梯現代化工程所產生的任何粉塵。

all.en: Tenants with health-sensitive operations such as laboratories should contact the property office for individual coordination plans.
all.zh: 從事實驗室等對健康敏感業務的租戶應聯絡物業辦公室，以擬定個別協調方案。

all.en: Approved alternative routes within the building have been mapped and posted on all common-area information boards.
all.zh: 大樓內已規劃核可的替代動線，並張貼於所有公共區域的資訊看板。

all.en: Any property damage caused by contractor activities will be promptly repaired at no expense to affected tenants.
all.zh: 因承包商作業所造成的任何財產損壞將迅速修復，受影響的租戶無須支付任何費用。

all.en: Lakeside Corporate Tower remains committed to providing the highest standard of building services to every business in our community.
all.zh: Lakeside Corporate Tower 始終致力於為社區內每一家企業提供最高標準的大樓服務。

all.en: Honestly, I would suggest planning some walking meetings outside during the hottest weekend, since the cooling will be completely down.
all.zh: 老實說，我建議在最熱的那個週末安排一些戶外步行會議，因為冷氣會完全停機。

all.en: The cafe across the street has offered a ten percent discount to our tenants whenever the lobby gets too warm for comfort.
all.zh: 對街的咖啡店表示，當大廳熱到不舒服時，會給我們的租戶九折優惠。

all.en: If you have a small fan at home you do not use much, consider bringing it in for the elevator wait area on hot afternoons.
all.zh: 如果您家中有小風扇不太用，不妨帶來放在電梯等候區，炎熱午後特別好用。

all.en: Last year a similar project actually finished three days early, so do not be surprised if the elevators return to normal sooner.
all.zh: 去年類似的工程其實提前三天完工，所以如果電梯比預期更早恢復正常運作，請別意外。

all.en: Please remind your delivery partners about the loading dock restrictions, because a confused courier once blocked traffic for an hour last summer.
all.zh: 請提醒您的配送合作夥伴注意裝卸區限制，去年夏天曾有一位搞不清楚狀況的快遞造成大門口塞車一小時。

all.en: Tenants on the upper floors might want to keep a sweater handy, since the temperature can swing surprisingly when the system reboots.
all.zh: 高樓層的租戶可以準備一件薄外套備用，因為系統重啟時溫度起伏可能比想像中大。

all.en: I personally suggest scheduling any important client visits for the third week, when both projects should be safely behind us.
all.zh: 我個人建議將重要客戶來訪安排在第三週，那時兩項工程應該都已順利結束。

all.en: Our front desk has a stash of phone chargers and reading glasses if you forget anything during the longer elevator waits.
all.zh: 如果您在較長的電梯等候時忘記帶東西，前台備有手機充電器和老花眼鏡可借用。

all.en: Two startup teams have already booked the community lounge as a temporary workspace for the noisiest construction afternoons.
all.zh: 已有兩家新創團隊預訂了社區交誼廳，作為施工最吵的午後備用辦公空間。

all.en: Thanks again for sticking with us; once everything is done, the new elevators should feel like a small upgrade to your daily life.
all.zh: 再次感謝您的配合；一切結束後，新的電梯應該會讓您日常生活感受到一點小小的升級。
